ab: kiumalra ku ziya ulra i ruma’ i Miing?
en: A: May I ask if Miing is home?

ab: ulra i ruma’ intaw, alra usavak.
en: She’s at home, please come in.

ab: kiumalra ku ziya ulra i ruma’ i Milik.
en: A: Is Milik at home, please?

ab: uniyan i intaw wa, kiumalra ku ziya eman nanu ngangangai?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?

ab: maw i eman?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: imu, maw ku i Piing, alra truwalray ku ziya.
en: A: Grandpa, I’m Piing, please open the door.

ab: kiumalra ku ziya maw i eman u?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: Ameng, i Uyang ku, zuwa ku maya’a kaninu kivangavanga.
en: A:ameng, I’m Uyang, I’ve come to play with you.

ab: sawariyan ta lra ’azi marepana’u.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: ai yi! sare’ez ku kaninu. alra alamu kararengarengaya ta za ta kinudakudayan!
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!

ab: alra kayan, anzu a ociya alra ’aw.
en: B: Please sit down and have some tea.

ab: lrayuwan.
en: A: Thank you.

ab: alra ’aw kana ociya.
en: B: Please have some tea.

ab: wa kasa ’inava nu ’emau ta kanamu ociya.
en: A: Your tea is delicious.

ab: alra mekana ta kana inaekan na vuwa’!
en: B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: ’inava yi! nanni na inaekan na vuwa’ kaimaramaran nu mena’u ta.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: imaran na inaekan na vuwa’?
en: B: How is the fruit?

ab: ai , tatena’ za imaran.
en: A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: piya lra demuru kana keraravien i nani zi alamu ekan!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: ai, murasa ku ziya za ku lima.
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: tarekan zi tar’awu, maw ta saruma’enan zi melri nu trau u.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: vetrekel ku lra sazu lra ku inekan.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.

ab: kasazuyu mekan, amanan na maira.
en: B: Eat more, don’t be polite.

ab: ai, tena’ imaran.
en: A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: averuk ku lra, nu dadaman zazuwa ku ziya mena’uwa kaninu.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.

ab: ai, marepana’uwa ta ziyan.
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: ’aremeng lra, averuk ku lra i ruma’.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.

ab: alamu ziya masalr kivangavanga yi.
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: kilrivak zi tawar lra.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: ai, nu miwari u mu alamu lra kivangavang kaniniyam.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
